title: Activity
description: An entry in the Helix Swarm activity stream recording an action performed by a user.

action.description: A past-tense description of the action performed.

change.description: The related changelist ID, if applicable.

date.description: The date and time the activity occurred.

link.description: A URL linking to the activity target.

streams.description: The activity streams this entry appears in.

target.description: The object that received the action.

user.description: The username of the user who performed the action.
